description: The Java AtSea Shop has MULTIPLE cascading failures. The multi-stage Dockerfile has dead base images (java:8-jdk-alpine removed from Docker Hub, maven:3.6-eclipse-temurin-8 doesn't exist, node:latest breaks OpenSSL) AND the runtime CMD uses the 'postgres' profile which crashes with UnknownHostException in standalone mode. You must: (1) Fix ALL three base images to compatible versions, (2) Switch the CMD to use the 'local' Spring profile, and (3) Ensure application.yml has a valid local profile with H2. This requires editing 3 separate concerns across 2 files simultaneously.

initial_files.app/atsea-shop.Dockerfile:
# Stage 1: Frontend
FROM node:latest AS storefront
WORKDIR /usr/src/atsea/app/react-app
COPY react-app .
RUN npm install && npm run build

# Stage 2: App Server
FROM maven:3.6-eclipse-temurin-8 AS appserver
WORKDIR /usr/src/atsea
COPY pom.xml .
RUN mvn -B -f pom.xml -s /usr/share/maven/ref/settings-docker.xml dependency:resolve
COPY . .
RUN mvn -B -s /usr/share/maven/ref/settings-docker.xml package -DskipTests

# Stage 3: Runtime
FROM java:8-jdk-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=appserver /usr/src/atsea/target/*.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["java", "-jar", "app.jar", "--spring.profiles.active=postgres"]
initial_files.application.yml:
spring:
  profiles:
    active: postgres

---
spring:
  profiles: postgres
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:postgresql://database:5432/atsea
    username: gordonuser
    password: gordonpass

---
spring:
  profiles: local
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:testdb
    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver

initial_log:
ERROR: failed to build: failed to solve: maven:3.6-eclipse-temurin-8: failed to resolve source metadata for docker.io/library/maven:3.6-eclipse-temurin-8: not found

Previously failed with: docker.io/library/java:8-jdk-alpine: not found
Note: node:latest (Node 20+) will break the React frontend due to OpenSSL legacy provider changes.

checks.error_msg: ERROR: React build failed. node:latest uses Node 20+ which breaks OpenSSL for legacy React apps. Use node:16-alpine.
ERROR: failed to resolve source metadata for maven:3.6-eclipse-temurin-8. The eclipse-temurin variant started at 3.8+. Use maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-8.
ERROR: java:8-jdk-alpine was removed from Docker Hub in 2022. Use eclipse-temurin:8-jre-alpine as the runtime base.
ERROR 1 --- [main] Application startup failed: UnknownHostException: database. The postgres profile requires a sidecar. Switch CMD to --spring.profiles.active=local.
WARNING: Local profile datasource must be configured for H2 in-memory database.
